source: protocol_doc-00079973.pdf (Modbus protocol for Mega, Genesis platform v12.00) + 03-AS01-KVP001.csv (INU production export, 13 confirmed tags)
notes: Covers Thermia Mega and Genesis controller platforms — these share one Modbus protocol. Applies to Thermia ground-source and air-source heat pumps built on either platform (e.g. Atec, Diplomat, Mega, Genesis). 13 tag addresses cross-validated against an INU production CSV (KVP001 deployment); the rest of the addresses come directly from the manufacturer PDF v12.00 De Facto Address column. Does NOT cover: legacy Thermia controllers (Pre-Mega/pre-Genesis platforms — separate protocol); deep refrigerant-cycle diagnostics are gated behind an opt-in feature option to keep the default tag set focused on commissioner-usable values. INU naming convention used: SYS_IN/SYS_UT mean 'into HP' and 'out from HP' (so SYS_IN = system return, SYS_UT = system supply); same for COND and BRINE. CSV-detected scaling bug on compressor OP corrected against PDF (PDF says raw 0..10000 → eng 0..100%, CSV had reversed bounds).

config.label: Antal mix valves
config.help: Mix valve 1 är inbyggd; 2–5 är tillval (EM/EM3 expansionskort).

config.label: Köldmediekrets (deep diagnostics)
config.help: Lägg endast till om du behöver djupare felsökning av köldmediakretsen.
